data.title: MasterControl awarded 2026 Buyer's Choice Awards for best capabilities, value, and customer relationship. From SALT LAKE CITY, Dec. 3, 2025.
data.description: MasterControl has been acknowledged by its clients for its top-tier capabilities, value for price, and customer relationship. The company, headquartered in Salt Lake City, has gained recognition in these aspects from various stakeholders. MasterControl specializes in providing quality, manufacturing, and asset management software tailored for regulated industries. This recognition underscores the exceptional quality and value that their products and services offer. The feedback from customers exemplifies the company's commitment to excellence, with a focus on meeting client needs effectively.
China’s central bank fixed the yuan reference rate at 7.0733 against the U.S. dollar, up from 7.0640 at the last close.
Trump’s tariffs are raising concerns among U.S. producers about potential restrictions on trade with Canada and Mexico.

data.title: Hapbee appoints Hasan Shahid to Board to strengthen capital markets & growth capabilities; seasoned technologist & investor.
data.description: A skilled individual specializing in technology, investments, and capital markets has recently been appointed to the Board of Directors at Hapbee. This prominent addition brings valuable expertise and experience to the company's leadership team. The new board member is expected to make significant contributions to Hapbee's strategic decisions and overall growth trajectory. This development is anticipated to have a positive impact on Hapbee's operations and potentially attract more investors.

data.title: Columbus Circle Capital Corp I shareholders approve business combination with ProCap BTC, leveraging bitcoin in modern finance.
data.description: In New York City, on December 3, 2025, Columbus Circle Capital Corp I (symbol: BRR) and ProCap BTC, LLC revealed that BRR's shareholders have sanctioned the planned merger with ProCap BTC at an exceptional general meeting. ProCap BTC is a contemporary financial services company that exploits bitcoin's capabilities. The Business Combination between the two entities has been given the green light by the shareholders of BRR.
Taiwan opened its overnight interbank rate at 0.805%, the same as the previous session.

data.title: Chinese robotics company PaXini impresses at iREX, global robotics event in Tokyo. Showcases tactile sensing & embodied intelligence prowess.
data.description: In Tokyo from December 3rd to 6th, 2025, the International Robot Exhibition (iREX 2025) is underway, attracting participants worldwide. Among the notable exhibitors is PaXini Tech, renowned for its work in tactile sensing and embodied intelligence. The event showcases cutting-edge robotics technology, drawing attention to the latest developments in the field.

data.title: Prologis declares quarterly dividend of $1.01 per share for quarter ending December 31, 2025.
data.description: In San Francisco on December 3, 2025, the Board of Directors of Prologis, Inc. (NYSE: PLD) announced a quarterly cash dividend for the quarter ending December 31, 2025. They approved a dividend of $1.01 per share on the company's common stock, with payment scheduled for December 31.

data.title: FDA approves Axogen's BLA for AVANCE® (acellular nerve allograft-arwx). Dec. 03, 2025: Axogen, Inc. announces FDA approval.
data.description: In Alachua, Florida and Tampa, Florida on December 3, 2025, Axogen, Inc. (NASDAQ: AXGN), a prominent company in the advancement and promotion of cutting-edge surgical technologies for revitalizing peripheral nerve function, revealed that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has given the green light to the Biologics License Application (BLA) for AVANCE® (acellular nerve allograft-arwx).

data.title: Vantage Data Centers opens 16MW facility in Kuala Lumpur, fully leased to 1 customer, showing strong demand.
data.description: Vantage Data Centers, a prominent global provider of hyperscale data center campuses, has officially opened its fourth facility, KUL14, at its Cyberjaya campus in Malaysia. This marks the completion of the KUL1 campus development. The KUL14 data center boasts a capacity of 16MW and has been completely leased to a sole customer, indicating robust demand and trust in Vantage's services. The launch of KUL14 demonstrates the company's dedication to delivering exceptional service, further solidifying its position in the market.
